summary: Phase 2 + P1 + P2 + Franchise Recruitment - All 37 backend tests PASSED. Comprehensive testing of public tokenized feedback forms, feedback admin endpoints, analytics summary/intelligence, branches recruitment-overview, resume upload, medical info, and WhatsApp resilience (fire-and-forget) completed successfully.
passed_tests: GET /api/feedback/form/{token} - returns 404 for invalid token (public, no auth required)
POST /api/feedback/{token} - returns 404 for invalid token (public, no auth required)
GET /api/feedback/submissions/summary - CEO can access, returns rejection_count, exit_count, pending_invitations, total
GET /api/analytics/summary - CEO can access, returns funnel, conversions_pct, hold_reasons, dead_reasons, sources, avg_hr_score, avg_manager_score, hires, avg_time_to_hire_days
GET /api/analytics/intelligence - CEO can access, returns best_interviewer, all_interviewers, weak_stages, insights
GET /api/analytics/intelligence - weak_stages sorted by drop_pct descending
GET /api/branches/recruitment-overview - returns correct structure (upcoming, active, total_upcoming, total_active)
GET /api/branches/recruitment-overview - each row has open_jobs, total_jobs, active_leads, total_leads, hired, hired_from_leads, status
GET /api/branches/recruitment-overview - status correctly derived from actual_opening_date
POST /api/leads/{id}/resume - accepts PDF file, returns resume_url and filename
PUT /api/leads/{id}/medical - stores medical info (blood_group, allergies, emergency contacts)
PUT /api/leads/{id}/medical - medical info persisted on lead
Lead transition to 'dead' - succeeds even if WhatsApp API fails (fire-and-forget resilience)
Lead transition to 'dead' - creates feedback_token (pending_invitations count increases)
Employee exit - creates feedback_token and succeeds even if WhatsApp API fails (fire-and-forget resilience)
Public feedback form GET - works WITHOUT Authorization header (returns 404 not 401)
Public feedback submit POST - works WITHOUT Authorization header (returns 404 not 401)
seed_data_creation: Test leads created with TEST_ prefix pattern for resume upload, medical info, dead transition, and employee exit tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 + P1 + P2 + Franchise features are fully functional. All feedback endpoints work correctly with proper role-based access control (CEO/HR/Super Admin only for admin endpoints, public for form GET/POST). Analytics summary and intelligence endpoints work with CEO/HR/Manager access. Branches recruitment-overview returns correct structure with status derivation. Resume upload validates file extensions and size. Medical info is properly stored on leads. WhatsApp 11za is LIVE httpx call but fire-and-forget - transitions succeed even when WhatsApp fails. Feedback tokens are created on dead transition and employee exit.

mocked_apis.WhatsApp 11za: LIVE httpx call - fire-and-forget (logs warnings on failure but does NOT fail the request)
